title: Respect Is Earned Under Pressure | Ferrum Doctrine Stickman
description:
Most men die without ever being respected. Here's why.

Keep one hard promise for seven days. Break it and restart. Or stay invisible. Decide.

Ferrum Doctrine — Manim cinematic stickman combat lessons.
